module.name: multicolumn
module.aiSpec: Lay out content in side-by-side columns. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->` — one section per column. Each section is ordinary markdown (text, lists, images, even other modules). Use `ratio` to size columns relatively (e.g. ratio: [1,2,1] for a wider middle column).

param.name: gap
param.label: Gap
param.desc: CSS length for the space between columns (e.g. 1.5rem)

snippet.label: Full-custom multi-column
snippet.text: <!-- @multicolumn ratio: [1,2,1], gap: 1.5rem, align: flex-start --> Left <!-- @ --> Center <!-- @ --> Right <!-- @end -->
